name: ccprism
description: Splits your AI coding agent usage into a calendar, rhythm, projects, and trend — one self-contained HTML report. Stands on ccusage.
author: Ernest Chen

scripts.fixture: bunx ccusage@latest claude daily --json > test/fixtures-real/daily.json && bunx ccusage@latest claude session --json > test/fixtures-real/session.json && bunx ccusage@latest blocks --json > test/fixtures-real/blocks.json && bunx ccusage@latest claude daily --instances --json > test/fixtures-real/instances.json && bun run scripts/sanitize-fixtures.ts test/fixtures-real test/fixtures
